opportunities.name: Fix Etsy Shop + Product Sync
opportunities.current_state: Etsy shop 404, Printify API 401, 0 products visible
opportunities.target_state: Functional Etsy shop with 10+ products live and purchasable
barriers: Etsy shop may not exist or be suspended
May require manual Etsy onboarding completion
actions_required: Login to Etsy and verify shop status
Check Printify dashboard for Etsy store connection
Complete any pending Etsy verification (ID, bank, policies)
If shop missing: complete setup or create new shop
If shop suspended: check email for notice and appeal
Manually verify products appear on Etsy

opportunities.name: AI Developer / Prompt Engineer Niche
opportunities.target_state: 4 AI designs live (Prompt Engineer, AI Agent, I Talk To Machines, etc.)
competition_evidence: AI Agent Parody spotted at €22.07 with only 2 reviews (very new)
No established sellers in Prompt Engineer niche
opportunities.target_audience: AI developers, ML engineers, ChatGPT power users, tech enthusiasts

design_concepts.name: Prompt Engineer Loading...
design_concepts.style: Loading bar parody with AI terms

design_concepts.name: AI Agent (Human Parody)
design_concepts.style: Human pretending to be robot / robot pretending to be human

design_concepts.name: I Talk To Machines
design_concepts.style: Minimalist text with subtle AI iconography

design_concepts.name: LLM Whisperer
design_concepts.style: Horse whisperer parody with neural network visual

actions_required: Upload to Printify and sync to Etsy
Iterate based on first 10 sales data
opportunities.confidence: MEDIUM-HIGH (first-mover, but niche unproven on Etsy)

opportunities.name: Discipline > Motivation Fitness Micro-Niche
competition_evidence: Discipline Over Dopamine spotted at €23.40 with only 2 reviews
Discipline/stoic positioning is contrarian and fresh
opportunities.target_audience: Fitness enthusiasts, stoic philosophy followers, productivity hackers, gym bros seeking differentiation
barriers: Niche may be too small for sustainable volume
actions_required: Test market response with 2 designs first
opportunities.confidence: MEDIUM (trend confirmed but niche size uncertain)

phase_1_ai_niche.description: Add 4 AI designs to existing 10 products

phase_3_full_scale.description: 40 SKUs across all niches with Etsy Ads

shop_not_fixable.mitigation: Create new Etsy shop, use manual listing, or pivot to Shopify

trend_saturation.mitigation: Rapid design creation, first-mover advantage, continuous trend monitoring

api_persistent_failure.mitigation: Manual Printify dashboard use, manual Etsy listing, alternative POD provider

low_conversion.mitigation: A/B test pricing, optimize photos, add reviews, enable Etsy Ads
